# Text Elements
Layer    Activation Map Dimension   Parameters    Number of Bias ^qjFBEuP4

INPUT

CONV-9-32

Pool-2

Conv-5-64

Pool-2

Conv-5-64

Pool-2 

FC3 ^Ixqn6nTX

- Size => K x K, padding = 0 and stride = 1  ^Y6CLhlEs

- Pool-k => pooling layer = K x K and padding = 0 ^O4xv6LEg

128 x 128 x 3          0               0 ^VEkvtKCr

120 x 120 x 32       (9 x 9 x 3 +1) x 32      1 bias per neuron ^asjJwFKO

60 x 60 x 32             0                    0 ^iroeJZtj

56 x 56 x 64        (5 x 5 x 32+1) x 64       1 bias per neuron ^ZFsWY3iK

28 x 28 x 64             0                    0 ^l4MMfrwk

In pooling layer stride and length of filter (F') is always same ^jtNWOSbH

24 x 24 x 64        (5 x 5 x 64+1) x 64       1 bias per neuron ^8a1H8olk

12 x 12 x 64             0                      0 ^a3oI0zZO

3                     (12 x 12 x 64 +1) x 3 ^9M5pQWGV

Total Parameters  = (9x9x3+1) x 32 + (5x5x32+1) x 64 + 
                      (5x5x64+1) x 64 + (12x12x64+1) x 3
                    = 189,187 ^6oCs6EWn
